purpose: Pre-import review artifact mapping normalized experiment three-element records to current catalog point nodes for seed/API import and ES testing.
import_guidance: Every target seed_key exists as a node_kind=point entry in the current catalog_tree.json.
Every normalized record now maps one-to-one to exactly one current catalog point node.
norm-ch15-018a and norm-ch15-018b share the same formation equation but keep distinct NaOH concentration, phenomenon explanation, safety note, and catalog target.
This artifact fixes catalog node binding only; it does not alter other reaction_equations_text or principle_mode values.
